description: Perfect for those casual days, these high ankle canvas shoes from numero uno are a great addition of comfort to your wardrobe. Either wear it as a high ankle, or tie the laces lower down and roll down the collar for a different look. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool, casual look.Upper Canvas upper for durability, sweat absorption enabling ventilation and easy maintenance Lace-up system with metallic eyelets for snug Fit and durability High ankle for extra support to the upper ankle and leg Stitch detailing to enhance shoe life and for style Synthetic brand badge appliqued on medial ankle for style Long tongue with embroidered brand name Rubber toe box for durability and protection to the forefoot Midsole Phylon midsole for durability and lightweight comfort Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Cambreel lining the soft padded insole for excellent arch support PU foxing for the toe box Brand name embossed on the heel Outsole TPR outsole for durability Diamond grooves on the forefoot and front heel, with horizontal grooves in the back heel and diagonal grooves along the shoe periphery for maximum traction Shoe careKnock off loose dirt by smacking the sneakers togetherWipe with a damp cloth to remove caked dirtRinse shoes with warm water Scrub with mild detergent using a gentle toothbrushUse a non-bleaching soap for coloured canvasRinse off with cool water
